title: Senior AI/ML Developer
company_focus: Neurotechnology software helping understand and communicate
description:
At Everway, our goal is to lead the world in Neurotechnology
software, helping transform the way we understand and are
understood.

We’re a global community of over 600 team members spanning
seven countries, including the UK, USA, Norway, Denmark,
Sweden, Australia, and New Zealand. By understanding and
addressing the unique needs of each individual, we're
creating a world where differences are recognized and
valued. A world where everyone can thrive.

We can only achieve our goals and continue to grow by having
high performing people in our team, people who share our
goals and are passionate about our mission. We pride
ourselves on our core values that are embedded within our
culture. These are to be curious, have courage, and commit
fully.

Join us at Everway - together, we can unlock the full
potential of every mind.

About the role

At Everway, we're building AI capabilities that serve 250M+
users and transform how 1,500+ employees work. We're looking
for a Senior AI Engineer to be the founding engineer for AI
Enablement — building MCP infrastructure, agentic workflows,
and driving AI adoption across the business.

This is a founding role with significant growth potential.
You'll be the engineer who builds the core infrastructure
that connects AI agents to our internal systems. You'll ship
production solutions and contribute to the roadmap as the
function evolves. As we scale, you'll have the opportunity
to grow into a leadership position and help build a team.

You'll build MCP servers that securely connect LLMs to
Salesforce, Snowflake, Google Workspace, and internal tools.
You'll develop agentic workflows that automate business
processes across sales, marketing, customer success, and
operations. And you'll work directly with stakeholders
across the organisation to understand requirements and
deliver working solutions.

We've already demonstrated strong traction: 400+ weekly
active AI users, tools delivering measurable ROI, and
executive support for ambitious next steps. You'll join at
the right moment to take on a critical growth area and make
it your own.

Main Responsibilities

- MCP Development: Build and maintain Model Context Protocol
  servers that securely connect LLMs to enterprise systems
  (Salesforce, HubSpot, Snowflake, Google Workspace,
  internal APIs)
- Agentic Workflow Development: Develop and ship production-
  grade agentic workflows with appropriate orchestration,
  guardrails, and observability
- Systems Integration: Build robust, secure integrations
  between AI systems and enterprise tools, handling
  authentication, rate limiting, and data governance
  requirements ● Stakeholder Collaboration: Work with teams
  across Sales, Marketing, Operations, and Customer Success
  to understand automation needs and deliver solutions
- Technical Documentation: Create documentation and reusable
  patterns that enable broader AI adoption across
  engineering teams
- Grow with the Function: As we scale, help recruit and mentor
  team members to expand AI Enablement capabilities

Essential Criteria

- BSc in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related
  technical discipline (or equivalent practical experience)
- 3+ years of software engineering experience, with meaningful
  exposure to AI/ML systems in production
- Hands-on experience with MCP (Model Context Protocol) —
  you've built MCP servers or have deep familiarity with the
  architecture and specification
- Experience building agentic AI systems: multi-step
  workflows, tool use, orchestration frameworks (LangGraph,
  CrewAI, or similar)
- Strong production Python skills — API development, async
  programming, systems integration
- Experience integrating with enterprise systems (CRM, data
  warehouses, productivity tools) via APIs
- Solid engineering fundamentals: CI/CD, testing,
  containerisation, cloud deployment (AWS preferred)
- Comfortable working autonomously and delivering in a fast-
  moving environment
- Clear communicator — able to work with non-technical
  stakeholders and translate requirements into working
  solutions

Desirable Criteria

- Experience with multiple LLM providers (OpenAI, Anthropic,
  AWS Bedrock)
- Interest in growing into team leadership and mentoring
- Knowledge of AI governance, data protection, and responsible
  AI practices
- Background in internal tooling, platform engineering, or
  developer experience
- Experience in EdTech, SaaS, or scaling organisations

Please submit your application on out website by 1st March
2026.

Please note: applications may close early due to high
demand, so early submission is encouraged.

Join our team and enjoy a competitive salary with bonus
opportunities, flexible work schedules, and comprehensive
health and wellness benefits. We offer flexible time off
plans, career growth through development programs, and a
collaborative, innovative culture where your ideas matter.
Ready to make an impact? Apply today and be part of a
company that invests in your success!

We are committed to providing a Drug-Free Workplace for all
employees.

We are an Equal Opportunity Employer. All qualified
applicants will receive consideration for employment without
regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin,
disability status, protected veteran status or any other
characteristic protected by law.

You can view our Recruitment and Selection Policy here.

Please click the link for our Privacy Notice
responsibilities: Build and maintain Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers that securely connect LLMs to enterprise systems including Salesforce, HubSpot, Snowflake, Google Workspace, and internal APIs
Develop and ship production-grade agentic workflows with appropriate orchestration, guardrails, and observability
Build robust, secure integrations between AI systems and enterprise tools, handling authentication, rate limiting, and data governance requirements
Work with teams across Sales, Marketing, Operations, and Customer Success to understand automation needs and deliver solutions
Create technical documentation and reusable patterns that enable broader AI adoption across engineering teams
Help recruit and mentor team members to expand AI Enablement capabilities as the function scales
use_cases: Enterprise AI integration connecting LLMs to business systems via MCP
Business process automation across sales, marketing, customer success, and operations using agentic workflows
Internal AI enablement serving 400+ weekly active users and 250M+ end users
Secure LLM-to-enterprise-system connectivity with proper governance
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role is building AI systems directly - MCP servers,
agentic workflows, and LLM integrations. The engineer is
hands-on with AI/LLM technology, not just supporting
infrastructure for ML teams. While it's internal tooling,
they're deploying and orchestrating AI agents, which
qualifies as ai-first.
